case_title: KIM WHATLEY ET AL VS. AABCREATION

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-04-2020 - JUDGMENT. PRIOR TO THE START OF TODAY'S HEARING THE ISSUE OF THE INVALID PROOF OF SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S IS ADDRESSED. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. COURT ALSO ADDRESSES THE ISSUE OF THE NAMED DEFENDANT IN THE CASE. PLAINTIFF'S WISHED TO FILE THE CLAIM ON DEFENDANTS AAB CREATION AND ANH VAN HA NOT AAB CREATION ANH VAN HA AS STATED ON THE ORIGINAL PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST TO FILE AN AMENDED PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IN OPEN COURT IS GRANTED AND THE CLERK FILES AMENDED PLAINTIFFS CLAIM AND DECLARATION IN OPEN COURT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE ON AMENDED PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. TRIAL IS HELD. PLAINTIFF'S KIM WHATLEY AND MAY CHAPPELL ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT AAB CREATION, REPRESENTED BY TU DAC KIEU, PARTNER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ANH VAN HA IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWD AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER PANG LY; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY WHATLEY, KIM CHAPPELL, MAY AS TO DEFENDANT AABCREATION ANH VAN HA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-04-2020 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY WHATLEY, KIM CHAPPELL, MAY AS TO DEFENDANT AAB CREATION HA, ANH VAN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WHATLEY, KIM CHAPPELL, MAY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AAB CREATION HA, ANH VAN $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,050.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) TU DAC KIEU, PARTNER FILED BY DEFENDANT AABCREATION ANH VAN HA
DECLARATION RE; FILING AMENDED CLAIM TO UPDATED NAMED DEFENDANTS FILED BY DEFENDANT AAB CREATION HA, ANH VAN
